verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come Lord Jesus quickly Even so come Take Your Bride away to mansion in the sky Come Lord Jesus quickly Even so come We are ready, come Lord Jesus, come

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Gentile days will soon be over now The Gospel is going back To Israel soon All the signs of end time Here and far Confirming Jesus, Very soon to come

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The Lord already Had appeared to us In the Pillar of Fire And the Pillar of Clouds Opening to us the Seven Seals Full redemption Now revealed to us

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Glory, Glory, Hallelujah Glory, Glory, Hallelujah Glory, Glory, Hallelujah We are ready, Come, Lord Jesus, come
